prompt: Sprite sheet for a children's game: 2x2 grid on PURE WHITE #FFFFFF background, WIDE white margins separating the 4 items, nothing touching the edges. Each item is ONE COMPLETE standalone SHOP BUILDING FACADE seen from the FRONT (street view), from ground to rooftop, cute storybook cartoon style, soft pastel candy colors, each with a door, a display window, a striped awning and one EMPTY BLANK rectangular wooden sign board above the door. STRICTLY FORBIDDEN: any letter, word, number or writing anywhere in the whole image - every sign board must be COMPLETELY BLANK smooth wood. The 4 shops: (1) cookie shop, display window full of stacked cookies; (2) gift box shop, window with wrapped gift boxes and ribbons; (3) party hall, balloons and a festive cake in the window, bunting flags on the awning; (4) recipe bookshop, window with a big open recipe book. Flat even lighting, no floor, no ground shadow, white background only.
